title: Thematic
description: Changes the Minecraft Title image to the texture according to the current update.
body: **(This pack works for 1.13 - 1.20)** Changes the Minecraft Title image to the texture according to the current update. * **If you would like different styles but for 1.20+ you might want to use [this](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/themed/versions?g=1.20&g=1.20.1)** **Teaser:** ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cLffIPyv/images/068893733f66a2ba44d8b52ff1b23fbca2b48387.png)
